tagline: Trusted Tree Experts Serving the Merrimack Valley
hero_subtitle: Professional tree removal, pruning, and land clearing for residential and commercial properties across Middlesex County.
service_area_description: Serving Billerica, Burlington, Chelmsford, Lowell, Wilmington, Tewksbury & surrounding towns.
seo_title: Middlesex Tree Service | Professional Tree Care in Billerica, MA
seo_description: Middlesex Tree Service — expert tree removal, pruning, stump grinding, and land clearing in Billerica and the Merrimack Valley. Fully insured.
services_subtitle: From a single branch to an entire lot — we handle every job with the same precision.
reviews_subtitle: Property owners across Middlesex County trust us to get the job done right.
cta_heading: Your trees deserve better than guesswork.
cta_subtitle: Get a free, detailed estimate from our experienced crew — usually within 24 hours.
footer_description: Professional tree care proudly serving Billerica and the Merrimack Valley.

services_featured.name: Tree Removal
services_featured.description: Complete tree removal for dead, damaged, or hazardous trees — residential and commercial.

services_featured.name: Land Clearing
services_featured.description: Efficient lot clearing for construction, development, or property restoration projects.

services_secondary.name: Stump Grinding
services_secondary.description: Below-grade stump grinding to eliminate tripping hazards and free up usable space.

services_secondary.name: Pruning & Trimming
services_secondary.description: Corrective and maintenance pruning to improve tree health, structure, and appearance.

services_accent.name: Emergency Tree Removal
services_accent.description: Rapid response for storm damage and fallen trees threatening your home or roadway.

services_wide.name: Bucket Truck Services
services_wide.description: High-reach bucket trucks for safe access to tall trees and overhead limbs.

about_features.title: Locally Owned & Operated
about_features.description: Based in Billerica and deeply rooted in the Middlesex County community we serve.

about_features.title: Fully Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Complete liability coverage and workers' comp — protecting your property and our crew.

about_features.title: Clean Site Guaranteed
about_features.description: Every job ends with a thorough cleanup. We haul debris and leave your property better than we found it.

reviews.name: Steve M.
reviews.text: Took down three massive pines next to our garage. Not a scratch on anything. These guys know what they're doing.

reviews.name: Diane C.
reviews.text: Fair price, showed up on time, cleaned up everything. Exactly what you want from a tree service.

reviews.name: Paul R.
reviews.text: We used them for land clearing before our addition. Fast, efficient, and the lot looked perfect when they finished.
